name: Hymn of the Sovereign
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At the start of battle, the wielder gains [StateArg1] Aliemus. Each time another Awakener releases Exalt, the wielder gains [StateArg2] Aliemus. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, after the wielder releases Exalt, they gain {Tentacle DMG} equal to [StateArg3]% of their Attack.
lore:
He is the king who knows all, the supreme ruler of Lemuria.

Lapis Lazuli serves as his throne, gold as his crown. Souls are his scepter, and he rests at the pinnacle.

Priests who serve the gods also serve him, kneeling before him,

loyal subjects and devout believers.


At night, the gods send moonlight, inviting him to the eternal palace,

where they share the food of souls, bestowing upon him divine wisdom.

Endless dreams allow him to witness the beginning of all things and the end of time.

He has learned: All beginnings stem from chaos; the gods awoke and built floating palaces in the darkness.

He has learned: The end of time is darkness, and all returns to chaos.


King of kings, beloved of the gods,

Who can compare to you?

Who commands in dreams as you do, wielding your majesty?

Noble god-king, youthful sovereign,

Sleep soundly.

Your subjects and followers will patiently await your return, bringing back the prophecy of the gods.

Respected ruler of the Nereids, master of the abyss,

Let us call upon your name and grant us protection,

Tulu, Tulu.
